summary: Full e2e testing of Rosebud Checkout Bot landing page and backend APIs. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified via Playwright.

issues: 'Open in Telegram' button links to https://t.me/ (generic) — should link to actual bot username

action_items: Update Telegram button href to actual bot deep link (e.g., https://t.me/your_bot_username)
critical_code_review_comments: Telegram button href is https://t.me/ (no bot username) — users clicking it won't be taken to the bot
esc() helper function is duplicated 3 times in gen_checkout_cmd — should be extracted once
server.py is <250 lines — file size is fine
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs (/api/, /api/status, /api/checkouts) working correctly. Bot online (bot_active:true). Frontend loads with dark neon design, terminal animation, marquee, How It Works (4 steps), Features section, checkouts table showing 'No checkouts yet', footer with /gen_checkout. Only minor issue: Telegram button has no bot username in URL.
